mapper.select: SELECT e.c_id AS course_id, l.subject AS course_name, COALESCE(p.p_name, l.prof) AS professor, TO_CHAR(e.e_year) || '-' || TO_CHAR(e.e_semester) AS semester, l.credit, CASE WHEN r.review_id IS NULL THEN 'PENDING' ELSE 'SUBMITTED' END AS status, r.rating_overall, TO_CHAR(r.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at FROM enroll e JOIN lecture l ON l.no = e.c_id JOIN class c ON c.c_id = e.c_id AND c.c_no = e.c_no LEFT JOIN professor p ON p.p_id = COALESCE(c.p_id, l.p_id) LEFT JOIN review r ON r.e_id = e.e_id WHERE e.s_id = #{studentId} AND e.e_status IN ('ENROLLED', 'COMPLETED') AND e.e_year = #{year} AND e.e_semester = #{semester} ORDER BY l.subject, c.c_no
